title: Expand /mcp to interactive add/remove/enable/disable/reconnect (CC parity)
description: CC ref: commands/mcp/mcp.tsx:63-84. CC /mcp (bare) renders MCPSettings TUI. Sub-commands: /mcp enable [server|all], /mcp disable [server|all], /mcp reconnect <server>. OC has no /mcp command; MCP status only visible via /doctor and /config. Parent spec: #539.
